subject: English

lesson.story_mission: Enter Fluency Theater, where readers rehearse sentences so every word is accurate, every phrase is smooth, and every voice matches the meaning.
lesson.objective: I can read grade-level text with accuracy, phrasing, pacing, and expression.
lesson.concept_explanation: Fluent readers do more than read fast. They read the words accurately, group words into meaningful phrases, use punctuation as voice directions, and reread to improve smoothness and expression.
lesson.common_misconception: A reader may race through the sentence, skip small words, ignore punctuation, or read in a flat voice that hides the meaning.
lesson.real_world_connection: Fluency helps you understand novels, articles, poems, speeches, directions, and classroom passages.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read accurately, group phrases, follow punctuation, reread, and use expression that matches the text.
lesson.mini_lesson: First read for accuracy. Then mark phrase groups and punctuation. Finally reread with pacing and expression.

audio.text: accuracy, phrasing, pacing, expression, punctuation, repeated reading
audio.label: Listen
audio.student_prompt: Listen, then say the important reading words with me.

hints: Reread the important words before answering.
Use the visual model and the clue in the text.
Check that your answer is supported by the sentence or passage.

worked_examples.feedback: Good fluency thinking. You matched your reading choice to the text.

misconception_bank.skips_words: The reader skips or changes words instead of matching the text exactly.
misconception_bank.punctuation_ignored: The reader does not let commas, periods, question marks, or exclamation points guide the voice.
misconception_bank.phrase_chunking_error: The reader breaks phrases in places that make the sentence harder to understand.
misconception_bank.expression_flat_reading: The reader reads every sentence in the same flat voice.

story.text: Listen to this page. In this mission, you enter a Grade 4 reading studio for read grade-level text with accuracy, phrasing, pacing, and expression. You will learn why the skill matters, watch a model, practice with feedback, and carry your strategy into independent reading. Press Start Mission when you are ready to begin.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This mini lesson teaches read grade-level text with accuracy, phrasing, pacing, and expression. First, name the reading job. Next, use the model to notice important words and clues. Finally, answer in a way that matches the text instead of guessing. Press Next to continue.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: This Watch page models the strategy. Listen for the teacher thinking aloud, because strong readers explain what they notice before they answer. Watch how the fluency clue is connected to the correct answer. Press Next to see the demo.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This demo gives you another guided example. Read the sentence or passage, point to the clue, and decide which answer is best supported. The goal is not speed alone; the goal is careful fluency thinking. Press Next when you are ready to practice.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: Practice time. Read the item, use the visual model, and press Read Question if you want the exact prompt read aloud. Press Listen when hearing the word, sentence, or passage will help. Choose or write an answer that fits the text.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: Challenge time. These questions ask you to apply read grade-level text with accuracy, phrasing, pacing, and expression with less help. Press Read Question for narration, use Listen for pronunciation or passage support, and slow down if two answers seem close. Your best answer should match the evidence.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: Checkpoint time. Show that you can use read grade-level text with accuracy, phrasing, pacing, and expression independently. Press Read Question if you want the prompt read aloud, and press Listen when audio will help you hear the sentence or passage. Answer carefully, then review your feedback.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: This badge page celebrates your progress. You earned credit for reading closely, using the model, and explaining your fluency thinking. Keep using this strategy whenever you meet a challenging text. Press Next to see your profile.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This profile page shows your growth and next steps. Review your accuracy, hints, and level progress. If one level needs more work, choose Practice This Skill and return to that level in the Skill Practice Center.
profile.label: Read This Page
